agendaInboxDesc: Find here the messages addressed to your agenda.
homeInboxDesc: You haven't received any messages yet!You will find here the messages that are addressed to you.
suggestLocationChangeDesc: Enter the changes you wish to suggest. These will then be processed by an administrator.
supportInboxDesc:
Do you have a technical question about using OpenAgenda? The answer is certainly in the documentation.

See the documentation

If your question relates more to the administrators of a calendar, you can reach them via the messaging at the bottom of each of your event files or directly on the calendar by clicking on "contact".

See my calendars or see my events

For any other question, you can join us directly:
agendaSchemaDesc: You need to add multiple fields to your form,, adapt their order or labels? Send us a short message
privateAgendaTitle: Request to activate a private agenda
privateAgendaDesc: Let us know more about your requirement:
publicAgendaTitle: Request to activate a public agenda
officialAgendaTitle: Request to activate an official agenda
officialAgendaDesc: Please post at least one event on your agenda before your request for officialization.
limitDatesTitle: Add limits to the dates of contributed events
limitDatesDesc:
Limit contributions to predefined event dates. 

Interested by this feature? Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
moderatorsDesc:
Moderators are members that can edit the events of an agenda and change event states, without having access to agenda settings.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
writeToAllTitle: Request to activate the "Write to them" function
writeToAllDesc:
Send a message to all members of your agenda or target the ones that have not yet contributed.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
contactConversationInitiated: Conversation initiated on the contact form
sendMessageToAdmin: Send a message to agenda administrators.
sendMessageToContributor: Send a message to event contributor.
sendMessageToMember: Send a message to event contributor.
retrieveConversationsOnHome: Find all your conversations on your OA messaging.
closeConversationDesc: Are you sure you want to close this conversation? It will not appear in your active conversations or in those of your interlocutors.
